headline: NYSE Owner and OKX Seek to Launch Perpetual Futures Tied to Oil
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intercontinental Exchange Inc., owner of the New York Stock Exchange, is working with crypto exchange operator OKX to launch oil futures contracts that never expire. content.title: NYSE Owner and OKX Seek to Launch Perpetual Futures Tied to Oil
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intercontinental Exchange Inc., owner of the New York Stock Exchange, is working with crypto exchange operator OKX to launch oil futures contracts that never expire.
